summary: NEXUS AI v4.4 Mega Enhancement Testing Complete - All 20 backend tests passed, frontend UI verified working. Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in publish-to-marketplace endpoint and missing Code icon import in Navbar.
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed MongoDB _id serialization in publish-to-marketplace endpoint (line 1751)
/app/frontend/src/App.js - Added missing 'Code' icon import from lucide-react
/app/backend/tests/test_mega_enhancement_v4_4.py - Created v4.4 test suite with 20 tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: v4.4 Mega Enhancement features fully tested and verified working. All new endpoints functional: Mega Discovery (109 tools from 9 sources), Investor Dashboard (27 investors), Enhanced User Profile, Marketing/SEO, MCP Integration (demo mode), Cloudflare Workers (demo mode), Creation Studio download/publish. Integration health at 36% (4/11 active). Platform has 46 AI agents.

v44_features_verified.mega_discovery_scan: POST /api/admin/mega-discovery - Discovers tools from GitHub, GitLab, NPM, PyPI, Maven, MCP Servers, Cloudflare, Eclipse
v44_features_verified.enhanced_user_profile: GET /api/users/{user_id}/profile/enhanced - Returns creator level, badges, portfolio, analytics
v44_features_verified.investor_dashboard: GET /api/admin/investor-dashboard - Returns 27 investors with tier info, platform metrics, fundraising status
v44_features_verified.seo_performance: GET /api/marketing/seo - Returns keyword rankings, organic traffic, backlinks
v44_features_verified.mcp_status: GET /api/admin/mcp/status - Shows discovered MCP servers (demo mode)
v44_features_verified.mcp_servers: GET /api/admin/mcp/servers - Lists MCP servers from mega scan
v44_features_verified.studio_download: POST /api/studio/download - Generates downloadable files (text, ebook/PDF, music)
v44_features_verified.studio_publish: POST /api/studio/publish-to-marketplace - Creates product and upgrades user to vendor
v44_features_verified.api_playground_ui: Interactive endpoint testing with 7 endpoints listed
v44_features_verified.investor_dashboard_ui: Shows 27 investors, fundraising status, key metrics (LTV:CAC 3.5:1, Gross Margin 85%, NRR 120%)
v44_features_verified.creation_studio_ui: 6 tabs (Music, Video, Writing, eBook, Image, Voice) with Download and Publish buttons

mocked_apis_confirmed: Cloudflare Workers - Returns 3 demo workers (image-optimizer, api-cache, analytics-tracker)
MCP Server connections - Discovery works, connection is demo mode
Fal.ai - No key provided, demo responses

bugs_fixed.issue: MongoDB ObjectId not JSON serializable in publish-to-marketplace response
bugs_fixed.fix: Added product.pop('_id', None) after insert_one to remove MongoDB _id before returning

bugs_fixed.issue: Missing 'Code' icon import causing Navbar component error

integration_health_score: 36% (4/11 active - Emergent LLM Key, Stripe, Resend, ElevenLabs)
